hero.subtitle: We take care of your website, marketing, content, and systems so you don't have to figure everything out or hire a full-time team.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: One integrated system that gets you customers — not four disconnected services.
services.footer: We don't sell a website, an ad campaign, or a content plan in isolation. We connect them so they actually work together for your business.

website.title: Website + Conversion System
website.description: A site built to turn visitors into customers — clear offer, smart layout, lead capture, WhatsApp and booking wired in.

marketing.title: Marketing + Lead Generation
marketing.description: Targeted campaigns that bring the right people to your offer, with tracking that shows what's actually working.

content.title: Content + Brand Consistency
content.description: Posts, reels, and visuals that show up regularly and look like one brand — not random posts from random tools.

automation.title: Automation + Follow-up Systems
automation.description: AI and automations that follow up with leads, answer common questions, and handle the repetitive work for you.

problemJourney.title: Sound familiar?
problemJourney.subtitle: Here's the path almost every business owner walks when trying to grow online — until something breaks.

professional.title: I need to look professional online
professional.description: No brand, no identity, no clear place to start. Everyone says you need a presence, but no one shows you how.

scattered.title: I guess I need social media and a website
scattered.description: You set up Instagram, a basic site, maybe a logo from Fiverr. Nothing connects, nothing matches.

visibility.title: I need people to see my business
visibility.description: The site is live, the page is up — and almost no one visits. No traffic, no visibility, no leads.

ads.title: Let's run ads
ads.description: You start spending on Meta and Google with no system behind it, hoping ads alone will fix it.

no_customers.title: Why am I not getting customers?
no_customers.description: Some clicks, some messages, but barely any real customers. The funnel leaks everywhere.

more_content.title: Maybe I need more content
more_content.description: You start posting more — reels, stories, blogs — without a clear plan. It feels busy, not effective.

overwhelmed.title: Everything is too much
overwhelmed.description: Five tools, three logins, two freelancers, and a hundred unread DMs. You can't tell what's working.

breaking_point.title: I just want customers, not all this
breaking_point.description: You didn't start a business to manage software, ads, and content all at once. You wanted to serve clients.

summary.title: WE GOT YOU
summary.description: Tools, content, ads, and tasks pile up — and the business owner is stuck doing all of it alone.

positioning.title: We fix this entire process for you.
positioning.body: We act as your digital team. We build your website, manage your marketing, create your content, and set up your systems — so you can grow your business without hiring a full-time team or doing it yourself.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have more questions?
contact.message: We would love to hear from you :)

whatsapp.message: Hi Khaled! We're interested in starting a project with you. Can you share more details?

launchpad.title: Foundation
launchpad.question: Do I look legit online?
launchpad.outcome: You now have a professional online presence people can trust.

growth_engine.title: Growth
growth_engine.question: Do I get customers from this?
growth_engine.outcome: Your business now has a system that attracts and converts customers.
features: Content execution system based on your business voice
Ongoing optimization of conversion + marketing system

custom_build.title: Elite
custom_build.question: Do I want everything done for me?
custom_build.outcome: Your entire digital business system is handled for you end-to-end.
features: Expanded execution system for content + marketing at scale

starter_example.question: What exactly does EYB do for my business?
starter_example.answer: We build and run your digital system including your website, marketing, content, and customer follow-up so your business can get customers online without you managing everything yourself.

development_time.question: Do I need technical knowledge to work with you?
development_time.answer: No. We handle everything for you. You only focus on your business direction while we manage the execution.

support.question: Is this just a website service or something more?
support.answer: It's much more than a website. We build a complete system that helps your business attract, track, and convert customers online.

customization.question: How does the process work?
customization.answer: We understand your business, build your system, launch it, and continuously improve it so it brings results over time.

training.question: Will this help me get more customers?
training.answer: Yes. The goal of everything we build is to turn your online presence into a system that generates real customer inquiries and leads.

pricing.question: What if I already have a website or marketing?
pricing.answer: We integrate or improve what you already have and build the missing parts so everything works together as one system.

design_approach.question: What do I need to start working with you?
design_approach.answer: Just your business idea, goals, and basic information. We handle the rest.

post_launch.question: Can I start small and upgrade later?
post_launch.answer: Yes. You can start with a basic setup and scale into a full growth system when you're ready.

ecommerce.question: Do you handle e-commerce functionality, such as payment processing and product management?
ecommerce.answer: Yes, we handle all aspects of e-commerce functionality, including payment processing, product management, order tracking, and more. We ensure that your online store is fully equipped to handle transactions smoothly and securely.

process.question: What is the process for starting a project with you?
process.answer: The process begins with a consultation to understand your needs and goals. After that, we provide a detailed proposal outlining the project scope, timeline, and cost. Once agreed, we begin the design and development phases, keeping you involved and updated throughout the process.

integrations.question: Can you integrate third-party services or APIs into my website?
integrations.answer: Absolutely, we can integrate various third-party services and APIs into your website to enhance its functionality. Whether it's a payment gateway, analytics tool, or any other service, we ensure seamless integration.

mobile_friendly.question: How do you ensure that my website is mobile-friendly and responsive?
mobile_friendly.answer: We follow responsive design principles and thoroughly test the website on different devices and screen sizes. This ensures that your website provides an optimal user experience on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

description.part1: When you decide to build your website, whether it's a personal site or an online store, it's natural to question the chances of success. You might wonder how long it will take and what you need to achieve your goals.
description.part2: I understand these concerns, which is why I've crafted a detailed roadmap for both paths. This roadmap includes timelines, expectations, requirements, and everything you need to know before making the investment. Read it carefully, and if you're ready, let's connect.

alpha.quote: A cinematic concept site for a premium powerlifting and bodybuilding gym — monochrome, editorial, and built to make a serious brand feel like a place worth walking into.
alpha.name: EYB

streak.quote: One quiet app for the things you do every day — streaks, focus, todos, and ideas. Free forever, installable anywhere.
streak.name: EYB

jojooshop.quote: We built Jojooshop to show what a fully custom e-commerce experience can look like when design, multilingual support, authentication, admin tools, and modern web engineering are handled properly from the start.
jojooshop.name: EYB

chikrice.quote: This is the best app I could ask for. It is simple, minimal, and straight to the point. It saved me so much time and frustration — I just eat, log my food, and the app counts everything for me. Thank you EYB team for giving us an app like this for free.
chikrice.name: EYB

healthyplus.quote: The website made ordering much easier for my customers. They can now see the honey products, prices, cart total, and send the full order to me on WhatsApp without all the back-and-forth.
healthyplus.name: Mahmood Alamarzooqi

aiyifen.quote: We wanted to test online sales for our clothing business, and EYB helped us build the store, set up payments and delivery, and run the campaigns. Within three months, online became a real sales channel for us.
aiyifen.name: Peter

resume-maker.quote: Paste any job description and watch your resume rewrite itself — keyword-matched, ATS-ready, and exported as a clean PDF in seconds.
resume-maker.name: EYB
